Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class ReverseStockSplit

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.ReverseStockSplit
public class ReverseStockSplit extends Object
ReverseStockSplit - Used to record the exchange of a company's security for the same company's new security at a preset rate and details related to the reverse stock split

    Corresponds to whether the entry is incoming or outgoing

    corporateActionGeneralInformation()
    Common fields for corporate actions
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<EntryReverseStockSplitEffectiveDate>
    effectiveDate()
    Effective date as declared by the primary exchange that generally coincides with cessation of trading in the old security and commencement of trading in the new security
    boolean
    equals(Object o)

    factorDenominator()
    The previous rate of the security before the distribution

    The rate of the security distribution
    int

    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<EntryReverseStockSplitQuantity>
    quantity()
    Corresponds to the position's trade quantity
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<EntryReverseStockSplitStockRate>
    stockRate()
    The rate (raw value, not a percentage, example: 50% will be .5 in this field) at which shares will be disbursed to the shareholder
    String
    toString()

    • effectiveDate

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<EntryReverseStockSplitEffectiveDate> effectiveDate()
      Effective date as declared by the primary exchange that generally coincides with cessation of trading in the old security and commencement of trading in the new security

      The previous rate of the security before the distribution

      Corresponds to the position's trade quantity

    • stockRate

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<EntryReverseStockSplitStockRate> stockRate()
      The rate (raw value, not a percentage, example: 50% will be .5 in this field) at which shares will be disbursed to the shareholder
